First they took our texts, than they took our pictures and now the took our colors. So let's Take Our Colors Back!

Break into the Big AI Corp building and rescue the color pieces. They can be located in any room so you have to figure it out.

But beware: They're full of cameras and security robot guards! So hide while searching in the rooms and run away using the exit door on the 12th floor.

This game is a submission for *Godot Wild Jam #91*
Theme: Theft
Used Wildcards:  Crayon Creation

## How to Play
Walk: A/D or Left/Right keys
Hide / Open Room: W or Up key
Elevator operation: W/S or Up/Down keys
